visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The camera opens with a close-up of pink chrysanthemum bouquets in the flower section of a Costco store. A hand points towards the flowers. The lighting is bright and typical of a warehouse supermarket. (2) The focus shifts to specialized chrysanthemum bouquets featuring central flowers with white cartoon-style smiley faces or winking expressions. These are arranged in colorful pink, yellow, and white clusters. (3) The camera pans down to reveal other varieties of flowers including green lilies and bird of paradise. In the background, a shopping cart and the blurred figure of a shopper move through the aisle. (4) The shot pans across more colorful chrysanthemum bouquets in purple, blue, and white. The camera tilts slightly upward to show the price tag of 239 NTD above the display shelves. The composition is vibrant and busy with floral textures.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 好市多隱藏價 彩色菊花239元. [Subtitle]: 你看菊花耶. (2) [Subtitle]: 你們知道什麼花最好養嗎? (3) [Subtitle]: 什麼花? (4) [Subtitle]: 菊花. (5) [Subtitle]: 為什麼? (6) [Subtitle]: X 菊花好癢. (7) [Subtitle]: 我不想理你. (8) [Subtitle]: 好市多現在有可愛的花. (9) [Subtitle]: 應該說他已經有很久了. (10) [Subtitle]: 但比爾剛剛看到的時候很興奮. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以如果你想要送比爾一朵花. (12) [Subtitle]: 你可以來這邊挑. (13) [Subtitle]: 還有這個天堂鳥. (14) [Subtitle]: 這太高級了不適合他. (15) [Subtitle]: 這菊花這樣子白色. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後桃色紫色. (17) [Subtitle]: 真的很漂亮. (18) [Subtitle]: 還有藍色. (19) [Subtitle]: 然後每一束都239元. (20) [Subtitle]: 好市多的花可以買很划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 hand of the main narrator, 1 female shopper in the background, 1 blurred person near the carts.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is only visible through their hand and voice; their dressing style cannot be fully determined.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A refrigerated floral section of a Costco warehouse with black buckets on metal shelves filled with various colorful bouquets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice telling a joke in a casual, conversational tone. Background lo-fi pop music with a steady electronic beat accompanies the speech. Ambient supermarket sounds and faint refrigerator hum are present. (2) A female voice responds to the joke with a slightly teasing and dismissive tone. The music remains consistent, maintaining a positive and relaxed atmosphere. No sharp transients or loud noise events occur. (3) The female voice begins a more structured narration about the various flowers available at Costco. Her speech rate is moderate and professional yet friendly. The music volume remains low but supportive of the vocal track. (4) The male voice returns to praise the visual appeal and affordability of the flowers. The interplay between the two voices and the continuous background music suggests a vlog-style shopping trip. The audio concludes with natural conversational flow.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the variety and affordability of flowers at Costco, specifically highlighting unique chrysanthemums with smiley faces, while entertaining the audience with a lighthearted joke.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of product prices and variety within a specific brand's store environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines humor with product showcase to drive engagement. The use of large text overlays and constant BGM aligns with standard short-form social media trends.
